headline: Southern Company Expands Battery Storage to Boost Grid Strength
summary: SO's Georgia Power begins a major battery storage project in Wadley, enhancing grid reliability and supporting renewable energy growth across the state.

headline: Here's What to Expect From CenterPoint Energy's Next Earnings Report
summary: CenterPoint Energy is set to announce its first-quarter earnings this month, and Wall Street expects the company’s EPS to increase by double digits.
